name: Computer Science Research
description: Latest research in computer science including machine learning, algorithms, systems, and more

papers.title: Efficient Transformer Architectures for Long Sequence Processing
papers.abstract: We propose a novel attention mechanism that reduces computational complexity from O(n²) to O(n log n) for long sequences. Our approach leverages sparse patterns in attention weights to achieve significant speedups while maintaining performance on benchmark tasks.

papers.title: Distributed Consensus Algorithms for Byzantine Fault Tolerance
papers.abstract: We present an improved Byzantine fault tolerance protocol that achieves consensus with fewer communication rounds. The algorithm is proven to tolerate up to f < n/3 faulty nodes and includes practical optimizations for real-world deployment.

papers.title: Graph Neural Networks for Knowledge Base Completion
papers.abstract: This work introduces a graph attention mechanism specifically designed for incomplete knowledge bases. Our method achieves state-of-the-art results on several benchmark datasets while requiring fewer parameters than existing approaches.
